title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Siemens India Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Siemens India Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Siemens India Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Siemens India Global Group:
Siemens India Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens India Global Group!
